content: Combining the task-agnostic Self-Refine framework with multiple-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms creates a two-layer self-improvement pipeline where Self-Refine handles iterative polishing of raw outputs, while multi-perspective reflection injects structured self-critique from diverse viewpoints at each refinement step to avoid local optima. This hybrid approach retains the original advantage of requiring no additional training or supervision, while addressing the common flaw of single-perspective self-refinement getting stuck in repeated blind spots.
